versions.version_description: This tab is much more accurate throughout, especially the bridge, which none of the previous tabs have come close to getting right. Includes many chord formations not present in previous tabs. Also no one so far has noticed that the second verse is mostly two chords instead of four.
Complete chords for the whole song / intermediate with split and suspended chords / suggestions for voicings.
The chords have been place above the correct lyrics. This facilitates timing.
It's complete, all the lyrics right with chords matched up with the words.
Has the best balance between making it easy and accurate, I gave the most accurate sounding chords while keeping some simple by using the capo.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Four Five Seconds ft. Kanye West and Paul McCartney.
Standard tuning
No Capo


[Intro]

[ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I think I've had enough, I might get a little drunk[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I say what's on my mind, I might do a little time[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause all of my kindness, is taken for weakness[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Now I'm FourFiveSeconds from wildin'[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
And we got three more days 'til Friday[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I'm just tryna make it back home by Monday, mornin'[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
I swear I wish somebody would tell me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, that's all I want[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Woke up an optimist, sun was shining I'm positive[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
Then I heard you was talkin' trash[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Hold me back, I'm 'bout to spaz[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]

Thinkin' how could I be so selfish[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]Asus4[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
  But you called 'bout a thousand times      wondering where I been[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Now I know that you're up tonight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Thinkin' how could I be so reckless[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Asus4[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
  But I just can't apologize, I hope you can understand[/tab]


[Verse 3]
